description: إنشاء ملفات الإعداد: .env.template و requirements.txt و README.md
command_preview:
import os

base = r'C:\Users\Revexn\CodeAnalyzer'

# 1. .env.template
env_template = '''# === CodeAnalyzer Configuration ===
# Copy this file to .env and fill in your API keys

# --- AI Provider Keys ---
GROQ_API_KEY=your_groq_api_key_here
GEMINI_API_KEY=your_gemini_api_key_here
OPENAI_API_KEY=your_openai_api_key_here

# --- Analysis Settings ---
MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB=10
MAX_DEPTH=5
ENABLE_SECURITY_CHECK=true
ENABLE_AST_ANALYSIS=true

# --- Report Settings ---
REPORT_FORMAT=html
REPORT_DIR=reports
INCLUDE_SCREENSHOTS=true

# --- Screenshot Settings ---
SCREENSHOT_DIR=screenshots
SCREENSHOT_BACKEND=mss

# --- Logging ---
LOG_LEVEL=INFO
LOG_DIR=logs
VERBOSE=0
'''

with open(os.path.join(base, '.env.template'), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(env_template)
